title: River (disambiguation)
content:
A '''river''' was a large natural [[water]]way.

==Rivers==
Notable rivers across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] were:

*'''[[Andrevea River]]''', [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*'''[[Atrivis River]]''', [[Generis/Legends|Generis]]
*'''[[Blue River]]'''
*'''[[Braan River]]''', [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]
*'''[[Chenataa river]]''', [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*'''[[Daplona River]]''', [[Ciutric IV|Ciutric]]
*'''[[Dreaming River valley|Dreaming River]]''', [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]
*'''[[East River]]''', [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]
*'''[[Estauril River]]''', [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]
*'''[[Frenzied River]]''', [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]
*'''[[Frieste River]]''', [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]
*'''[[Gachoogai River]]''', [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]
*'''[[Grand Kessel River]]''', [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]
*'''[[Grandmother's Tears]]''', [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]
*'''[[Juntrack River]]''', [[Draenell's Point]]
*'''[[Kelita River]]''', [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]
*'''[[Krisa River]]''', [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]
*'''[[Lona Cranith River]]''', [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]
*'''[[Nihun River]]''', [[Brosi]]
*'''[[Noga River]]''', [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]
*'''[[Orrineswa River/Legends|Orrineswa River]]''', [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]
*'''[[Pharine River]]''', [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]
*'''[[Quatreen River]]''', [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]]
*'''[[Ressl River]]''', [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]
*'''[[Reyno River]]''', [[Brosi]]
*'''[[River of Light]]'''
*'''[[River Weeping]]''', [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]
*'''[[Roaring River]]''', [[Tasariq]]
*'''[[Salc River]]''', [[Garos IV]]
*'''[[Solleu River/Legends|Solleu River]]''', [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*'''[[Taal's River]]''', [[Aram]]
*'''[[Temple River]]''', [[Orellon II]]
*'''[[Teonsqua River]]''', [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]
*'''[[Torosogt River]]''', [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]
*'''[[Unnh River]]''', [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]
*'''[[Vlassy River]]''', [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]
*'''[[West Reyno River]]''', [[Brosi]]
*'''[[West River]]''', [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]
*'''[[Whispering River]]''', [[Endor/Legends|Forest moon of Endor]]
*'''[[Yarlubb River]]''', Forest moon of Endor
*'''[[Z'gag/Legends|Z'gag River]]''', [[Ruuria/Legends|Ruuria]]

==Other==
*'''[[River of Fire]]''', a river of lava on [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]]
*'''[[Great Mother River]]''', an artificial river on the [[Ithorian Herdship]], [[Bazaar (Ithorian Herdship)|''Bazaar'']]
*'''[[Great Mother River Hotel]]'''
*'''[[Great Mother River Restaurant]]'''
*'''[[Great River]]''', a visionary galactic pathway where [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and refugees could escape the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]]
*'''[[Rivers of Stone]]''', a cavern on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]
*'''''[[River of Blood]]''''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warship
*'''[[Roaring River Cantina]]'''
